title: LS - Smooth View (I think old I'm drop update)
description:
English:
Optimized, smooth, and beautiful modpack for every new version. Developed alone and works on multiplayer servers. Enjoy! (I’m Turkish, so I used a translator for this text!)
body:
This modpack allows you to install all the necessary mods for the game without you having to (from my perspective). I often find things missing in many modpacks, and I filled those gaps myself.

Youtube: @SolemnYT
Discord: https://discord.gg/HR9vmz3m8u
